title: platostoma thymifolium
intro: Platostoma thymifolium, also known as African blue sage, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Platostoma thymifolium is often prepared as a tea or infusion for consumption, and it can also be used in herbal remedies in the form of extracts or tinctures.
